"junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/tnunnink/Documents/Projects/logixdb/src/LogixDb.sln", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.sourceCode.SQL", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "sqlite" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.LRUPopupBuilder$1/SQL Dialect": [ "TSQL", "SQLite" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
Refactor AOI and Parameter mappings: replace `ParameterRecord` with `Parameter`, update mapping logic, and clean up related code.
Refactor `Parameter` formatting logic: replace `Dimension > 0` check with `Dimensions?.IsEmpty is false` for improved null safety.
Add `ModuleConnectionMap` for module connections, update `ModuleTransformer` to generate corresponding tables, and add migration tests for `module_connection`.
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.5.0 across projects, and update `TestSource` to fix version serialization issues.
Update `M202606112100CreateModuleConnectionTable`: make `rpi` column nullable
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.0 across projects.
Remove all deprecated SQL scripts and their associated logic, including merge scripts (e.g., `MergeAoi`, `MergeController`) and helper functions, as part of cleanup.
Remove all QA-related SQL scripts, procedures, functions, views, and tables as part of discontinued feature cleanup.
Refactor QA migration tests: split into migration-specific test cases for improved granularity and clarity.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and expand `ClearData` handling in `CryptoExtensions` to support additional types.
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.1 across projects and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Rename `QA` to `Qa` in `ComponentOptions` and related QA migration tests for consistency.
Update `TagMemberMap` to handle null parent paths consistently, add helper extensions for `ParentPath` and `MemberOrBaseName`, and adjust `.idea` workspace configuration.
Bump project versions to 0.13.1 and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and fix null check in `CreateTagTreeFrom` migration
Bump project versions to 0.13.2.
Introduce `GetSource(scrub: true)` for sanitizing Target data and enhance module and connection mapping logic.
Add `MergeModuleConnection` logic for managing module connections in SQLite and SQL Server.
Update QA scripts to rename `environment_data/hash` to `variables_data/hash`, adjust references, and bump project versions to 0.13.3.
Fix typo in `MergeModuleConnection.sql` (`module_connetion` → `module_connection`) and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration in multiple components and add breakpoint in `ModuleTransformer` for debugging.
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.2 across projects and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Add `record_hash` column to `MergeModuleConnection` script, make `connection_name` nullable in `module_connection` table, and create `module_port` table with migration script.
Reformat SQL scripts to improve readability by adding consistent indentation and updating SELECT-INTO structures across multiple merge scripts.
Add migration tests for `module_port` table creation and reformat `MergeModuleConnection.sql` for consistent SQL style
Add `MergeModulePort` logic to SQLite and SQL Server writers and scripts for handling `module_port` data
Fix `module_port` migration: correct relation and data type issues, update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Remove duplicate `IsChassis` column mapping from `ModulePortMap`.
Add migration for `tag_concat` function in SQL Server
Update versioning logic: include `VersionNumber` in `PostVersion` scripts and adjust related data models
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and rename `@VersionNumber` to `@NextVersionNumber` in `PostVersion.sql` script.

Moving rung to flat deduplicate mmodel for consistency and space reduction. Refactor `rung`-related logic across migrations, maps, and transformers: replace `rung_id` with `rung_hash`, remove unused columns, and update merge scripts for improved consistency.
Refactor `rung`-related logic: replace `rung_id` with `rung_hash`, remove `routine_id` and `content_hash`, update merge/migration scripts, and adjust column definitions for consistency.
Refactor `rung` merge scripts to use `MERGE` statement, add `container_name` handling, update indices and column mappings for improved consistency.
Add `container_name` to `rung` migration return columns
Refactor `rung_reference` merge logic: remove redundant `record_hash` condition, update column map to disable hashing for `rung_hash`.
Bump project version to 0.14.0 in service and CLI.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and clean up redundant task entries for improved clarity.
Refactor `rung` table migration: remove unique index from `container_name`, `routine_name`, and `rung_number`, update tests, and improve `tag_concat` function handling null/empty `MemberPath`.
Improve `tag_concat` function: handle null/empty `TagName` values
Add `type_tree_for` function: resolve recursive type hierarchies in `data_types_for`. Include migration and unit test.
Bump project version to 0.14.1 in service and CLI.
Update migration tags for `type_tree_for` function to use `MigrationTag.DataType`.
Fix incorrect `ModuleConnectionMap` column mapping for `OutputTag` and add `config_tag` mapping in `ModuleMap`.
Add `config_tag` column definition tests for SQL Server and SQLite migrations
Add `config_tag` column to `Module` migrations and update corresponding SQL scripts
Remove `last_modified_date` column from `controller` table in SQL Server and SQLite migrations and update associated tests.
Refactor SQL migrations: standardize helper function names to use `_at_version` suffix, update related tests, and bump project version to 0.14.2.
Add migrations and procedures for retrieving QA variables as bit, real, and date types, with corresponding tests and SQL scripts.

MESSAGE.value: Add migration tests for `module_port` table creation and reformat `MergeModuleConnection.sql` for consistent SQL style
Add `MergeModulePort` logic to SQLite and SQL Server writers and scripts for handling `module_port` data
Fix `module_port` migration: correct relation and data type issues, update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Remove duplicate `IsChassis` column mapping from `ModulePortMap`.
Add migration for `tag_concat` function in SQL Server
Update versioning logic: include `VersionNumber` in `PostVersion` scripts and adjust related data models
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and rename `@VersionNumber` to `@NextVersionNumber` in `PostVersion.sql` script.

Moving rung to flat deduplicate mmodel for consistency and space reduction. Refactor `rung`-related logic across migrations, maps, and transformers: replace `rung_id` with `rung_hash`, remove unused columns, and update merge scripts for improved consistency.
Refactor `rung`-related logic: replace `rung_id` with `rung_hash`, remove `routine_id` and `content_hash`, update merge/migration scripts, and adjust column definitions for consistency.
Refactor `rung` merge scripts to use `MERGE` statement, add `container_name` handling, update indices and column mappings for improved consistency.
Add `container_name` to `rung` migration return columns
Refactor `rung_reference` merge logic: remove redundant `record_hash` condition, update column map to disable hashing for `rung_hash`.
Bump project version to 0.14.0 in service and CLI.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and clean up redundant task entries for improved clarity.
Refactor `rung` table migration: remove unique index from `container_name`, `routine_name`, and `rung_number`, update tests, and improve `tag_concat` function handling null/empty `MemberPath`.
Improve `tag_concat` function: handle null/empty `TagName` values
Add `type_tree_for` function: resolve recursive type hierarchies in `data_types_for`. Include migration and unit test.
Bump project version to 0.14.1 in service and CLI.
Update migration tags for `type_tree_for` function to use `MigrationTag.DataType`.
Fix incorrect `ModuleConnectionMap` column mapping for `OutputTag` and add `config_tag` mapping in `ModuleMap`.
Add `config_tag` column definition tests for SQL Server and SQLite migrations
Add `config_tag` column to `Module` migrations and update corresponding SQL scripts
Remove `last_modified_date` column from `controller` table in SQL Server and SQLite migrations and update associated tests.
Refactor SQL migrations: standardize helper function names to use `_at_version` suffix, update related tests, and bump project version to 0.14.2.
Add migrations and procedures for retrieving QA variables as bit, real, and date types, with corresponding tests and SQL scripts.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Add migrations and procedures for retrieving QA variables as bit, real, and date types, with corresponding tests and SQL scripts.
